jtbd: Unblock production — arrive, instantly see what's holding up the line, act on it
outOfScope: Right sidebar (FDA audit, open gaps, EMP)

variants.A: Urgency-First Stream — no tabs, single list grouped by resolve/monitor/reference
variants.B: Score-Led Tabs — supplier scorecard with bar visualization, lots with status-first columns, FSMA as third tab
variants.C: Priority Action Cards — blocking hero card up top, expiring lots as 2-col cards, supplier standings compact
variants.D: Expandable Master List — combined supplier+lot list, expand ConAgra to see lots and audit inline
variants.E: Timeline Feed — alert strip up top, chronological Now/Today/This week/Before FDA sections
